title: Adjusted Grip
description: Moves the create mod extendo grip to provide a better view.
body:
Love using the extendo grip? Well now you can see better too!

Comes in 3 sizes  :3

![Default Extendo Grip view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/214a44540d02086232501cc096b5242826c417a1_0.webp)![Adjusted Extendo Grip view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd04970c92b747fce65a243c69e699e16c757ad1_0.webp)
